Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Comply With Discovery Order;
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTs DIPAK PATEL and 505 CYPRESS AVENUE, LLC DBA THE INDUSTRIAL HOTEL's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Comply With Discovery Order - To be heard at 9:00 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)

Defendants Dipak Patel And 505 Cypress Avenue, Llc Dba The Industrial Hotel'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Comply With Discovery Order
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance(s) on TUE-JUL-02-2013:
Kevin P. Cody, Esq. of Ropers, Jameski, Kohn & Bentley [408.287.6262] appearing for DIPAK PATEL and 505 CYPRESS AVENUE, LLC dba THE INDUSTRIAL HOTEL, defendants / moving parties;
No other appearances.

The Court modifies and adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants DIPAK PATEL and 505 CYPRESS AVENUE, LLC dba THE INDUSTRIAL HOTEL'S Motion to Dismiss for Failure to Comply with Discovery Order is GRANTED. Good cause exists to grant terminating sanctions with respect to plaintiffs Micles, Travis, Romes, Greider, and Abdalla due to their repeated failure to submit to deposition, and their disobedience of a court order compelling them to submit to deposition before May 31, 2013. The declaration testimony of Defendants' counsel Kevin P. Cody establishes that Defendants noticed the depositions of plaintiffs Cindy Mickles, Patricia Travis, Jamal Romes, Rachel Greider, and Derek Abdalla for November and December of 2012. Plaintiffs failed to attend their depositions. Defendants' counsel noticed plaintiffs' depositions again in April of 2013 for mid-May of 2013. Plaintiffs again failed to appear. Defense counsel obtained an order on May 17, 2013 compelling plaintiffs to submit to deposition on or before May 31, 2013. Plaintiffs have failed to do so. Trial is set for July 22, 2013. The complaints of plaintiffs Cindy Mickles, Patricia Travis, Jamal Romes, Rachel Greider, and Derek Abdalla ONLY are dismissed with prejudice. This order does not purport to affect the complaint of any other plaintiff. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
